name: se4458-ai-agent-listing
description: SE4458 Assignment 2 - AI Agent Chat Application for Short-Term Stay Listings

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd mcp-server && npm install && cd ../agent-backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names ollama,backend,frontend "npm run start:ollama" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
